channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump urges Israel and Iran to 'immediately' halt attacks
item.description: President Donald Trump launched "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, involving large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Pope urges respect for migrants in historic speech to Spanish parliament
item.description: Pope Leo XIV called for renewed respect for migrant rights and international law during a landmark address to Spain's parliament.

item.title: 2026 Tony Awards winners announced: See the full list
item.description: "Schmigadoon!" won Best Musical with 12 nominations, and "Liberation" took Best Play at the 2026 Tony Awards.

item.title: Lawsuit seeks to block UFC fight at White House on Trump's birthday
item.description: The lawsuit calls the event "deeply corrupt" and argues it aims to benefit the president and his allies without proper authorization.
